description: This pipeline imports an image via Bio-Formats and extracts its OME metadata. The main steps are to input an image, extract its OME metadata, and output the metadata.

577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.name: annotation-merge
577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
